properties.Name: Docks
properties.Description: A long pier and several wooden structures...

properties.Name: East Wall
properties.Description: Large stone walls were constructed to protect the Col following a hostile invasion in Y22

properties.Name: Obelisk of the Armada
properties.Description: Standing proud in the centre of the valley is the second variation of the Obelisk of the Armada, where the pack’s rules have been carefully etched and displayed throughout their long history. A familiar site to any veteran members of the Armada, as is the adjacent bonfire that seems to never be allowed to burn out.

properties.Name: Leader's Den
properties.Description: The pack's current leader's reside in this den, a large dragon carving guard's the den's entrance.

properties.Name: The Warrens
properties.Description: A natural cave network within Dreamer’s Col that has been expanded to fit Armada’s population. These caves house a mix of communal and private dens, and pack storage facilities.

properties.Name: Hot-spring Baths
properties.Description: What was once natural rock pools fed by an underground spring, have been carved into a series of different sized baths. Below this cavern runs magma channels keeping the stone here a consistent warm temperature.

properties.Name: The Forge
properties.Description: The Pack's forge where weapons and trade goods are produced. Overseen by the Master of Arms.

properties.Name: Gale Gorge
properties.Description: A forested territory beyond the mountains where hunting and farming take place.

properties.Name: Training Room
properties.Description: An underground chamber outfitted to train wolves.

properties.Name: Fish Hatchery
properties.Description: A section of the beach has been pegged off with wooden rope and netting to maintain an ideal environment for hatching fish. Fishing within the hatchery is forbidden.
